caption: A man with glasses and dark hair tied back performs in front of a backdrop of tan horizontal blinds. He is wearing a white long-sleeved shirt under a dark blue vest with red and white embroidery on the lapels and a red and white beaded necklace. He stands behind a microphone on a stand, speaking or singing while holding a light-colored musical instrument, partially visible at the bottom of his chest. In the foreground, the backs of several people's heads are visible, including individuals with blonde and grey hair. The text "ORCA" appears in white capital letters on the right side of the screen. Across the frames, the man's facial expression and mouth movements change slightly as he performs, and he subtly shifts his posture and the position of his hands on the instrument, while the overall setting and other people remain stationary.
